seed_instruction: Write an email asking for information on how to get a copy of medical records for my father from their facility from 2002.
org_constraint: The email should contain exactly 150 words.
new_constraint: The email must include three paragraphs, with each paragraph containing no fewer than 60 words.
instruction: Write an email asking for information on how to get a copy of medical records for my father from their facility from 2002. The email should contain exactly 150 words. The email must include three paragraphs, with each paragraph containing no fewer than 60 words.
response:
Subject: Request for Medical Records from 2002

Dear Medical Records Department, I am writing to you today on behalf of my dear father, who recently passed away and whose medical history is now very important for us all to review carefully with great attention. We need official copies of his complete medical records that were generated during his time at your respected facility way back in the year two thousand and two, when he was receiving treatment there under our family care. Please let me know exactly what specific documents we must provide or fill out first before you can legally release this sensitive personal health information to us immediately without any unnecessary delays happening soon at all.

Our family doctor has specifically requested these historical files because they contain critical diagnostic notes and treatment plans that directly relate to an ongoing genetic condition affecting our entire extended family group right now today. Without accessing those precise records from over twenty years ago, we cannot fully understand the original diagnoses made by your esteemed physicians back then nor can we properly interpret how his condition may have evolved throughout his life journey up until his passing earlier this year after suffering greatly for many long years together as a devoted unit always supporting each other through every single difficult moment experienced by all of us constantly everywhere together.

Could you kindly please confirm if there are any outstanding balances owed by his estate or account that might prevent the immediate release of these archived files before sending them electronically via secure portal methods available nowadays globally? Furthermore, please advise us on whether a notarized letter of authorization signed by his surviving legal next of kin or sole beneficiary is required alongside proof of death certificate copies along with valid government identification numbers issued recently by various authorities worldwide so we can proceed quickly without further complications arising unexpectedly tomorrow morning itself today instead of waiting longer than necessary anymore today itself right now immediately please thank you very much indeed.<|im_end|>
final_answer:
